title: LandOS Phase 1 strategic reset: manual lead through discovery

workstreams.name: Data stabilization, QA isolation, and hard safety boundaries
workstreams.operatorOutcome: Operating data is protected and recoverable, synthetic QA is physically separate, and every prohibited LandPortal API/MCP, paid, external-outbound, offer-send, and contract-send path is disabled before workflow use.
workstreams.requiredDataState: Existing operating database backed up and reconciled; QA database starts synthetic and separate.

steps: Confirm LandPortal is described as authenticated browser-only
Confirm only functional role names appear in Phase 1 surfaces

failureConditions: real records used as QA fixtures
offer or contract can be sent
important data is overwritten or lost

requirements.text: Real operating data and QA data/artifacts are visibly and physically separated.
A private encrypted backup/restore path restores business data into a clean local target with row-count and integrity reconciliation.
LandPortal API, token, manual endpoint, and MCP routes are unavailable at runtime; authenticated read-only browser work is the only approved path.
Jarvis outbound is owner-only and paid actions, spending, offer sending, and contract sending are prohibited by focused guards.
Phase 1 surfaces use functional role labels and preserve legacy IDs only as hidden compatibility aliases.

workstreams.name: Unified actionable Lead Card and reconciled executive counts
workstreams.operatorOutcome: Manual intake immediately creates one durable actionable Lead Card, automatically starts progressive research, and the same opportunity drives Acquisitions, Mission Control, Jarvis explanations, and Lead-to-Deal promotion.
workstreams.requiredDataState: Existing Lead/Property/Deal records adapted without copying or loss; synthetic QA opportunities only in QA storage.

steps: Observe progressive research state and actions
Reconcile all executive counts and drilldowns

failureConditions: incomplete research blocks a discovery call

requirements.text: Manual lead entry creates one durable Lead Card immediately and automatically starts research.
Mission Control, Acquisitions, Jarvis explanations, and database counts derive from the same opportunity records and reconcile.
The Lead Card progressively updates, remains actionable, and never blocks a discovery call because research is incomplete.
County/public/property research progress and provider failures are visible, actionable, and recoverable.
The owner can promote the same opportunity from Lead to Deal and the pursued card receives a subtle visible highlight.

workstreams.name: Best-available discovery research package
workstreams.operatorOutcome: Every Lead Card exposes one evidence-backed current discovery report and PDF with parcel, visual, comp, market, scoring, strategy, gap, confidence, and call-prep information even when identity or providers remain unresolved.
workstreams.requiredDataState: Authenticated browser session when available plus isolated resolved, unresolved, thin-market, and provider-failure QA fixtures.

steps: Run authenticated read-only LandPortal visible extraction
Capture parcel facts, visible comps, free Show on Map, and visuals
Open complete resolved report and PDF
Open unresolved report and confirm useful identity questions

requirements.text: A real authenticated LandPortal browser session extracts visible parcel facts, visible comps, the free Show on Map screenshot, and relevant visual evidence without API dependence or paid action.
Comparable selection enforces sold-driven value, active/pending context, up to five, 3/5/10-mile expansion, 12/18/24-month limits, county-wide disclosure, and provider deduplication.

One current report drives the Lead Card and PDF and includes identity, visuals, land characteristics, deed findings, Market Pulse, explainable Land Score, preliminary value and 40-60 percent offer range, two strategies, gaps, sources, confidence, and call questions.

An incomplete or unresolved property still produces a useful seller-focused call brief while unsupported parcel conclusions, confident valuation, offer preparation, and automatic pursuit remain blocked.

workstreams.name: Transcript reconciliation and complete Phase 1 acceptance
workstreams.operatorOutcome: A human can paste or upload a transcript, Jarvis and the Acquisitions Agent reconcile it into durable shared memory and work, and the entire five-lead/day workflow survives refresh, restart, recovery, and independent live review.
workstreams.requiredDataState: Five synthetic QA opportunities in isolated QA storage; operating data used only for explicit live owner acceptance.

steps: open created tasks and owner decision

failureConditions: state lost on refresh or restart

requirements.text: Transcript paste and transcript-file upload both preserve an immutable original and work from the Lead Card.

Jarvis and the Acquisitions Agent reconciliation produces a concise summary, seller statements separate from verified facts, named parties, explainable motivation, asking price/timeline/property statements, contradictions, deeper-research tasks, follow-up, and one allowed next action.
The complete Phase 1 state survives hard refresh and managed restart.
A five-lead/day synthetic simulation passes entirely in isolated QA storage.
One real lead can complete the entire workflow live without using real records as QA fixtures.
The workflow is ready for and receives the owner's usefulness judgment after independent combined live verification.
